title: Life Potato
description: This datapack makes Poisonous Potatoes useful for the Player. When eaten, it grants an extra heart, up to a maximum of 20 hearts.
body: # Life Potato Poisonous Potatoes are no longer useless! With this datapack, eating a Poisonous Potato will permanently increase your max health by 1 heart (2 HP), allowing you to reach a maximum of 20 hearts. ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command.
